title: Maintain workplace health and safety processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Provide information about workplace health and safety

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of implement control measures according to the hierarchy of control, or refer measures to designated personnel for implementation
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control measures according to the hierarchy of control, or refer measures to designated personnel for implementation.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
